name: Khainite Shadow Coven
general: Slaughter Queen on Cauldron of Blood

battleTraits.name: Shadowmasked
battleTraits.description: Enemy units subtract 1 from Hit and Wound rolls when attacking friendly units in the Charge phase.

regimentAbilities.name: Consecrated Revulsion
regimentAbilities.description: Pick a friendly unit. Add +1 to Save rolls until next turn.

regimentAbilities.name: Dance of Death
regimentAbilities.description: Pick a friendly unit in combat. That unit can move 2D6" during the enemy Combat phase before attacks are made.
